flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Bridgewater State University fell 20% between 2021 and 2024 (39.4% → 31.7%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Bridgewater State University fell 14% between 2021 and 2024 (62.4% → 53.4%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Bridgewater State University rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($10.7k → $11.8k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 5 pp at Bridgewater State University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (54.6% vs 59.8%).
